ew_context: Price completing corrective wave 2 retracement - inverse H&S structure suggests resumption of primary bullish impulse
pattern_desc: Classic inverse head and shoulders formation with head at 202.77 and neckline at 203.47. Right shoulder showing strength above 202.97.
invalidation: Close below 202.83 on H4 timeframe breaks the right shoulder and negates the bullish reversal pattern
market_context: Safe haven JPY weakness amid Iran peace optimism supports CHF strength - cross benefiting from risk-on sentiment
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

CHFJPY has carved out a textbook inverse head and shoulders pattern with the head forming at 202.77 and neckline resistance at 203.47. The pattern spans multiple H4 candles with clear left shoulder at 202.88, providing strong structural significance. Current price at 203.40 sits just below the critical neckline breakout level, positioning for the measured move target.

RSI at 67.3% shows bullish momentum building while remaining below overbought territory. EMA20 at 203.33 has crossed above EMA50 at 203.24, confirming short-term trend shift. ATR of 0.18 suggests normal volatility environment with laminar flow conditions supporting controlled breakout potential.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 203.47 (neckline breakout trigger), 203.65 (prior swing high structure)
- **Support**: 202.83 (pattern invalidation level), 202.97 (right shoulder low)

## Invalidation Level

Close below 202.83 on H4 timeframe would break the right shoulder formation and negate the inverse head and shoulders reversal pattern.

## Macro & Flow Context

Iran peace talk optimism is weighing on safe haven JPY while supporting risk appetite. CFD momentum alignment confirms institutional positioning for the breakout continuation.
